'''wayobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanoacrylate|cyanoacrylate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanoacrylate|cyanoacrylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wayobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæyebeth|wæyebeth]] || [[word:wæyebej|wæyebej]] || [[word:wæyebesh|wæyebesh]] || [[word:wæyebe|wæyebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wayoyoboth|wayoyoboth]] || [[word:wayoyoboj|wayoyoboj]] || [[word:wayoyobosh|wayoyobosh]] || [[word:wayoyobo|wayoyobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wayoboth|wayoboth]] || [[word:wayoboj|wayoboj]] || [[word:wayobosh|wayobosh]] || [[word:wayobo|wayobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wayofboth|wayofboth]] || [[word:wayofboj|wayofboj]] || [[word:wayofbosh|wayofbosh]] || [[word:wayofbof|wayofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wayobotho|wayobotho]] || [[word:wayobojo|wayobojo]] || [[word:wayobosho|wayobosho]] || [[word:wayoboko|wayoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wayoboth|wayoboth]] || [[word:wayoboj|wayoboj]] || [[word:wayobosh|wayobosh]] || [[word:wayobo|wayobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wayobothol|wayobothol]] || [[word:wayobojol|wayobojol]] || [[word:wayoboshol|wayoboshol]] || [[word:wayobokol|wayobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wayobothotho|wayobothotho]] || [[word:wayobojojo|wayobojojo]] || [[word:wayoboshosho|wayoboshosho]] || [[word:wayoboko|wayoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wayobothon|wayobothon]] || [[word:wayobojon|wayobojon]] || [[word:wayoboshon|wayoboshon]] || [[word:wayobokon|wayobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wayobothoro|wayobothoro]] || [[word:wayobojoro|wayobojoro]] || [[word:wayoboshoro|wayoboshoro]] || [[word:wayobokoro|wayobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
